calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-02-2021 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Mariellen Baker is present, and has filed an authorization to appear for Plaintiff/Respondent, California Girl, LLC
Attorney, Joseph K. Bravo is present and representing Defendants/Appellants, James Bong Enterprises

All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Ms. Baker appearing for Plaintiff/Respondent testifies.
Mr. Bravo representing Defendant/Appellant testifies.

The court releases to Mariellen Baker Plaintiff/Respondent the documents pursuant to a subpoena issued to SFPD on 8/17/2021.

Mr. Bravo presents copies of case citations to strike language from the judgment.

The Court takes a brief recess and takes the matter under submission.
Court resumes and rules from the bench as follows:

Judgment is affirmed and appellants request to strike language from the judgment is denied.

The Court gives the following reasons:
Appellant did not suffer monetary loss;
Appellant waived their rights by not alerting the Court of the Cross-Complaint; and
There is no authority impeding appellant from filing a civil lawsuit to make them whole.

Judge: Gerardo Sandoval, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (608).
